violations.text: Faucet handles at handsink were observed leaking when in use. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2025
The wall behind the chemical dispensing pump by the 3 bay sink was observed in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
